/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/server.dir/server.cpp.o -o server  -Wl,-rpath,/home/aruvle/cmake1/CMake_II/build/common/rmath:/home/aruvle/cmake1/CMake_II/build/modules/module1:/home/aruvle/cmake1/CMake_II/build/modules/module2:/home/aruvle/cmake1/CMake_II/build/modules/assembly2 common/rmath/librmath.so modules/module1/libmodule1.so modules/module2/libmodule2.so modules/assembly2/libassembly2.so -lpthread
